latin: Hora tertia noctis, feles mea in faciem meam sedit et miaulavit. 'cibum volo,' oculi eius dicebant. catillum plenum ante eam posui. olfecit, despexit, et abiit. nihil volebat nisi me excitare.

questions.prompt: What time does the cat wake its owner?
What does the cat do with the food?
questions.target: Sniffs it, scorns it, and leaves
choices: Sniffs it, scorns it, and leaves

translation: At the third hour of the night, my cat sat on my face and meowed. 'I want food,' her eyes said. I placed a full bowl before her. She sniffed, scorned it, and left. She wanted nothing except to wake me up.
